title: Which wallscroll should I get

I would say the third. But I've been wandering on the second one, but somewhy I found Asuka's face a lil' creepy... And Shinji should be in the background! :evil: /

[]:             Quote Post by Shadow Blaziken » Wed Aug 02, 2006 11:54 am I'd say the third one. Eva-01's in a really badass pose there. :P

[]:             Quote Post by narcosis219 » Wed Aug 02, 2006 6:28 pm well the first one looks awesome cuz u got two nekkid girls on there.

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Wed Aug 02, 2006 7:50 pm First one is.... weird... I guess it's your choice, just hide it if your friends come over, unless they're eva fans too.

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Tue Aug 08, 2006 9:19 pm The first one is too small to make out the details.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Wed Aug 09, 2006 12:47 am The second one. I must admit though, I've got one on eBay a couple of months ago, and I must admit that I find it to be above anything I've seen before. I've calendered it, and it looks awesome: Note: This is my first post on Eva Monkey Forums. Hail to the Eva Monkey!

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Aug 09, 2006 8:40 am @AuthenticM Welcome aboard! (on topic): I gotta get a towel like that...

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Aug 11, 2006 3:43 pm FauÃŸtin wrote: @AuthenticM Welcome aboard! (on topic): I gotta get a towel like that...

[]:             Quote Post by the3rdchildren » Fri Aug 11, 2006 4:15 pm The Die-Sterne artbook has those images in. I'm hoping it isn't against the rules to post scans of them, but since they're being discussed here they are: First wallscroll: [URL=http://img156.imageshack.us/my.php?image=wallscroll1wu7.jpg] [/URL] Second wallscroll: [URL=http://img129.imageshack.us/my.php?image=wallscroll2ld7.jpg] [/URL] I'd get the second one, it's a lot nicer than the first. Plus naked Asuka looks exceptionally young and unsettling.

[]:             Quote Post by rei on your parade » Fri Aug 11, 2006 6:59 pm I like the second one.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Aug 11, 2006 10:07 pm I'm disturbed by the position of Kaworu's right hand in the second one. In all honesty, I don't really like any of those.

[]:             Quote Post by Israfel777 » Fri Aug 11, 2006 10:24 pm I agree with Tim, it looks odd. But it took me squinting my eyes just to see that. The first one looks better IMO. It may look a little creepy but I'd get that one. Edit: I take that back, I just saw the close ups for each one. I'd definitely go with one still.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Fri Aug 11, 2006 11:12 pm Timstuff wrote: I'm disturbed by the position of Kaworu's right hand in the second one. In all honesty, I don't really like any of those.
